title: No more trials
description: a datapack to disable trial chambers from spawning
body:
A quick and easy datapack I made to prevent trial chambers from spawning.
NOTES
1. It won't erase already generated trial chambers.
2. I made it for fun, so dont follow it blindly. I suggest to test it first.


If you want to contact me for support and feedback, DM me on Discord: perry123444
